{{Infobox concept
| name = Ghostwater
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Ghostwater Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ghostwater is a world originally designed by the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] to house a research facility. Though the facility was abandoned nearly fifty years before the [[Monarch]]'s death, it served as a significant location for various entities, including [[Heralds]] who looted the site and a janitorial staff that was eventually consumed. The world is characterized by an ocean of blood and dust, as well as specimen tanks that contain advanced biological entities. The facility's prime chamber is a hollowed-out cave containing an oracle tree, and the entire world eventually suffered a catastrophic collapse due to spatial distortions and the failure of an anchor intended to keep it tied to its reality. The name Ghostwater also refers to a highly prized substance found within this world. Described as a spirit-enhancing liquid, it is considered a treasure by many, despite being viewed as mere trash or a byproduct of failed prototypes by the [[Monarch]]. When consumed, a single drop can fuse with an individual's madra channels at the base of the skull, acting as a powerful mental and physical enhancement that can increase reflexes and speed. This [[essence]] can be tapped for power, though it must draw from the user's body and spirit to replenish itself over time. The unique spirit known as [[Dross]] is also a creation of the [[Ghostwater facility]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Created by the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]] to house a research facility, Ghostwater is an icy, vast ocean pocket world containing a bubble of [[water aura]]. Although the location had been sealed and looted by [[Heralds]] for years, it was recently revisited by groups such as the [[Tidewalker sect]] and a [[Ninecloud Court]] delegation. The world contains treasures, including a prize known only to the [[Akura]] family and a substance that can rejuvenate the mind, body, and spirit. However, due to damaged anchor [[binding]], this dying world is expected to crumble within a few weeks or months.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">26</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a pocket world created by the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] was designed to contain a research facility.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a pocket world that will crumble within the next few months due to damaged anchor [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a vast ocean containing a bubble of [[water aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] contains a prize known only to the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] was supposed to have been abandoned until recently.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is described as an icy cold ocean.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] has been closed for years.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] was sealed away and subsequently looted by [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Something was going wrong with [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] contains treasures.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[construct]] has a measure of control over [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is intact enough to last a few more months.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Supervising the entrance of [[Ghostwater]] is an [[Underlord]] assignment.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a location with a portal.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is an ocean.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a dying world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a substance found in a pocket world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] spent a month in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a power that was created as an attempt to create other wells.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a world that only has a few weeks left.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]' mind, body, and spirit were rejuvenated by his time in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a white pearl that [[Harmony]] drank.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ghostwater]] is a place where the [[Tidewalker sect]] and [[Ninecloud Court]] delegation were present.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The boy on the ground drank two drops of ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Ghostwater is an [[island]] featuring a cave marked by a [[jade]] doorframe. During a recent visit, [[Lindon]] discovered upgrades for his soul and body there, along with [[Underlord dream tablets]]. The location also contains meat that provides enhancements and works of art previously recovered from a gold [[dragon]]. While [[Dross]] used the site to absorb information constructs, [[Northstrider]] attempted to establish transportation gates to the [[island]]. After their time there, the group departed the owned location via cloudship.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] is an [[island]] containing a cave with a [[jade]] doorframe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] is a location [[Lindon]] has recently visited.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] had more items in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] has found works of art in [[Ghostwater]] that were recovered from a gold [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] found upgrades to his body and soul in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] is a location that [[Northstrider]] attempted to create transportation gates to.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The group traveled from [[Ghostwater]] via cloudship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] found [[Underlord dream tablets]] in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] is a location [[Lindon]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] meat provides enhancement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] has an owner.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]] is a place where [[Dross]] absorbed information constructs.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has taken a drop of ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ghostwater]] is a location where [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] fought [[Sopharanatoth]]'s sister.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ghostwater]] is a version of [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ghostwater is a unique location that can be accessed through doorframes. This realm served as the birthplace of [[Dross]] and once hosted several [[Heralds]] as guests. While [[Northstrider's pocket world]] bears a resemblance to Ghostwater in miniature, the original realm was eventually destroyed when Sophara burned it. Following this event, Ghostwater ceased to exist.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] was born from [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ghostwater]] is a location accessible via doorframes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Some [[Heralds]] were guests in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's pocket world]] looks like [[Ghostwater]] in miniature.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara burns ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's ghostwater was gone.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ghostwater]] was formed with [[Archlord soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ghostwater]] is an isolated new world.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwater]] is the world where [[Dross]] was born.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] is deeper than the wells in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ghostwater]] is a concept [[Lindon]] envisioned for the new world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A white pearl rolled down the tube. "This is what Harmony drank," Dross said. "Ghostwater."<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|"Aside from the Tidewalker sect and the Ninecloud Court delegation, we achieved the least of everyone in Ghostwater."<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“I had much more than this in Ghostwater.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Yerin and I fought her after you killed her younger sister in Ghostwater."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
